decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing artifact-based combos to generate advantage and overwhelm the opponent. By combining cards like Goblin Welder, Emry, Lurker of the Loch, and Urza's Bauble, the deck aims to create a powerful engine that can quickly assemble key pieces like Agatha's Soul Cauldron or Phyrexian Dragon Engine for a game-winning play. Cards like Mox Opal and Lotus Petal help accelerate the deck's game plan, while cards like Ensnaring Bridge provide protection. Through careful sequencing and strategic use of artifacts, the deck aims to out-tempo and out-value the opponent to secure victory.

The main aim of this deck is to achieve a quick victory through aggressive plays and efficient use of spells. By utilizing powerful creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent, along with a mix of cantrips and removal spells like Lightning Bolt, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Force of Will and Daze to protect its threats and slow down the opponent's game plan. With a streamlined mana base and card selection tools, the deck can effectively control the game tempo and secure a win.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while maintaining a strong tempo advantage. By utilizing a combination of disruptive spells like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Fatal Push, coupled with efficient creatures like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters, the deck aims to control the board and apply pressure to the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Back to Basics and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student help further disrupt the opponent's game plan, allowing the deck to assert dominance and close out games quickly. The deck's mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors and spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to create a prison-like board state that restricts the opponent's options and controls the game. Cards like Urza's Workshop, Karn, the Great Creator, and Trinisphere disrupt the opponent's strategy while cards like Candelabra of Tawnos and Manifold Key support the artifact theme. The goal is to lock down the opponent's resources and win through powerful finishers like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. The deck aims to grind out the opponent and establish dominance through powerful artifact synergies and control elements.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive plays with a combination of creatures and removal spells to quickly defeat the opponent. The deck includes synergistic cards like Goblin Bombardment and Erode, alongside efficient removal like Swords to Plowshares. Creatures like Amped Raptor and Guide of Souls provide strong attacking power, while planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah offer additional support. The mana base is optimized for consistent casting of spells, including utility lands like Karakas and Wasteland. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful board presence.

The key concept of this deck is to control the board with disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push, while also putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and helps smooth out draws, while cards like Back to Basics and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares punish opponents for relying too heavily on nonbasic lands or creatures. The deck aims to maintain a tempo advantage by efficiently dealing with threats and presenting its own to close out the game quickly.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with a combination of countermagic, hand disruption, and removal spells. It also aims to apply pressure on the opponent through efficient creatures like Brazen Borrower and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck utilizes cards like Brainstorm and Ponder to find the necessary answers and threats while leveraging cards like Fatal Push and Daze to control the board. Overall, the deck aims to maintain tempo and momentum while disrupting the opponent's strategy to secure a victory in the Legacy format.

The main concept of this deck is to generate and utilize a large amount of mana quickly through cards like Dark Ritual and Lion's Eye Diamond in order to cast a high storm count spell like Tendrils of Agony for a game-winning combo. The deck also includes tools like Thoughtseize and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect the combo. Cards like Infernal Tutor and Burning Wish allow for additional flexibility and options in executing the combo. The deck is built around efficiently generating and maximizing the storm mechanic for a powerful finish.

The deck focuses on quickly generating mana with cards like Lotus Petal, Dark Ritual, and Chrome Mox, while also using cards like Burning Wish and Beseech the Mirror to tutor for key combo pieces like Tendrils of Agony. The deck relies on casting multiple spells in a single turn to build up storm count, ultimately finishing off the opponent with a powerful Tendrils of Agony. The deck also includes cards like Veil of Summer and Thoughtseize to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The main idea of this Legacy 1 vs 1 Aggro - Dimir Tempo deck is to apply pressure on the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent, while disrupting their game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Daze. The deck also includes efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out, as well as powerful counterspells such as Force of Will. The mana base is streamlined for consistency, with cards like Polluted Delta and Underground Sea enabling the deck's strategy to control the tempo of the game and secure a quick victory.

This UWx Control deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The deck utilizes cards like Force of Will, Force of Negation, and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt opponent's game plan while digging through the deck with Brainstorm, Ponder, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. Murktide Regent provides a threat on the board while cards like Back to Basics and Prismatic Ending help to deal with various threats. The mana base is optimized for consistent land drops and fixing with fetch lands and dual lands.

This deck focuses on aggressive creature plays with cards like Amped Raptor and Orcish Bowmasters, while also utilizing disruption with cards like Thoughtseize and Swords to Plowshares. Utilizing Goblin Bombardment for extra reach and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for a powerful win condition, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The mana base is set up to support all three colors of Mardu, with utility lands like Wasteland and Karakas sprinkled in for added value. The deck's strength lies in its ability to apply pressure early and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

This deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty, using cards like Faithless Looting and Unmask. Once these creatures are in the graveyard, the player can use spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back onto the battlefield for a devastating combo. The addition of cards like Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers and Atraxa, Grand Unifier provide disruption and protection for the combo, making it difficult for opponents to stop the reanimation strategy. The deck focuses on leveraging powerful creatures from the graveyard to win the game.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive black creatures and disrupting the opponent's game plan through targeted discard spells and removal. The key to this deck is to control the board early with efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out, while also applying pressure with creatures like Dauthi Voidwalker and Nethergoyf. The deck also utilizes cards like Thoughtseize and Daze to disrupt the opponent's hand and tempo. With a mix of efficient creatures, disruption, and resource denial with Wasteland, the deck aims to close out the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on playing aggressively with tempo in mind, using cards like Lightning Bolt and Dragon's Rage Channeler to deal damage quickly. It also includes control elements like Force of Will and Daze to disrupt your opponent's game plan. The deck seeks to maintain card advantage with cards like Mishra's Bauble and Ponder, while also having threats that can quickly close out games like Murktide Regent and Delver of Secrets. Overall, the goal is to apply pressure early and maintain control throughout the game to ensure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Lotus Petal and Eldrazi Temple, allowing for early plays of powerful Eldrazi creatures like Reality Smasher and Thought-Knot Seer. Chalice of the Void is used to disrupt opponents' plans, while cards like Eye of Ugin and Cavern of Souls help ensure Eldrazi spells resolve. Glaring Fleshraker and other Eldrazi creatures provide aggressive threats, backed up by removal spells like Kozilek's Command. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with efficient Eldrazi creatures and disruptive plays to secure victory.
